name: Dilly Zucchini Ricotta Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Line a muffin pan with paper baking cups or grease with cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and dill weed until well combined.
4. In a separate medium bowl, whisk together the milk, melted margarine (or butter), and eggs. Stir in the ricotta cheese and shredded zucchini until smooth.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring just until moistened. The batter will be stiff.
6. Fill each prepared muffin cup about 2/3 full with batter.
7. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from the oven and serve immediately.
